name: Adohiinage
short_description: A survival horror experience set in a cursed forest. Players must explore, solve puzzles, and evade terrifying creatures lurking in the shadows. With relentless tension, a haunting atmosphere, and monsters hiding within the woods. Survival depends on wit, and instinct.
detailed_description:
Adohiinage plunges players into the role of Gary, a simple handyman on vacation, who is on an unsettling journey deep within an ancient, cursed forest where survival is anything but guaranteed. Stuck in an old cabin, surrounded by an overwhelming darkness that seems to breathe, players must explore, piece together clues, solve puzzles, and keep a eye on the darkness that surrounds them.

  • Uncover The Lore - As players push further into the woods, they will uncover chilling lore and unsettling truths about the land, each revelation more terrifying than the last. Every step is a test of wit and instinct, as creatures—both seen and unseen—stalk the shadows, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

  • Exploration Awaits - Gary will be able to explore the woods freely to find items, experience unique areas, events, and complete puzzles as he journeys through the cabin, basement, and the many acres of forest surrounding him.

  • A Unique Light Cycle - Players have to manage their time as they explore the woods.  Not only do they need to keep an eye out for collectibles and creatures as they roam around the forest.  They also need to manage their time, because when the sun starts to set, they won't be alone anymore...

With its eerie atmosphere, relentless tension, and a mysterious narrative, Adohiinage is a descent into horror filled gameplay, where the forest itself seems to whisper warnings that no one will truly understand until it's too late. Players must navigate the dark terrors, adapt to their changing surroundings, avoid numerous creatures slowly creeping through the woods, and piece together the story that binds them to this haunted wilderness.
